summary: Analytical and results-driven BI Developer / Data Analyst with 6+ years of experience bridging the gap between raw data and business strategy. Experienced in designing data models, optimizing DAX, and automating Power BI solutions. Proven track record in building multi-tenant reporting solutions and delivering insights that improve operational efficiency.

projects.name: HealthTech Platform (Clinic Analytics)
bullets: Designed robust data models for Power BI dashboards and contributed to dbt transformation pipelines
Built web-style dashboards optimized for embedded analytics across multiple client workspaces
Optimized performance using advanced DAX techniques, DAX Studio, and Tabular Editor
Reduced data latency to near real-time via Power BI DirectQuery integrated with Apache Spark
Automated workspace creation and refresh alerting with Azure DevOps Pipelines and PowerShell
projects.description: End-to-end embedded Power BI analytics platform for a health tech company, supporting multi-tenant clinic-level reporting.

projects.name: Power BI Admin Monitoring
bullets: Engineered end-to-end pipeline to capture historical governance and usage telemetry via Admin APIs
Orchestrated data with Fabric Data Pipeline and set up Fabric Lakehouse for log storage
Transformed data using Fabric Dataflow Gen 2 and Notebook
Built dashboard covering daily user activities, workspace-level metrics, and detailed audit logs
projects.description: Custom governance and usage monitoring system extending Power BI's default admin workspace with historical analytics.

projects.name: Fashion Retail Analytics Platform
bullets: Contributed to data cleaning, transformation, and modeling during legacy-to-cloud migration using dbt
Validated and monitored pipelines with Dagster to ensure accuracy of migrated datasets
Designed star schema data models to optimize dashboard query performance
Developed Power BI dashboards tracking sales KPIs for a large fashion retail enterprise
Implemented Power Automate to bypass capacity refresh limitations
projects.description: Enterprise BI reporting platform for a large fashion retailer, migrated from legacy systems to Snowflake-based cloud data warehouse.

projects.name: BPO Workforce Analytics System
bullets: Designed scalable data models and developed end-to-end data pipelines
Built Power BI dashboards monitoring headcount, attendance, compliance, and performance KPIs
Maintained headcount accuracy between 97%–103%
Performed capacity planning contributing to a 10–15% improvement in staffing efficiency
projects.description: Workforce analytics system for an IT BPO company, enabling real-time headcount tracking and performance monitoring.

projects.name: Employee Turnover Analysis
bullets: Implemented sentiment analysis on 5,000 turnover records using Python
Used Pandas and Matplotlib for data cleaning and EDA to identify primary drivers of turnover
Developed a machine learning regression model to predict turnover with 82% accuracy
Visualized key findings through Tableau dashboards
projects.description: Predictive analytics project identifying factors leading to employee resignations using ML and data visualization.
